key_findings: [no_economic_candidate_feed] Removing economic candidate feed reduces reason_to_care coverage by 30 candidates. Structural candidates from economic feed are lost; only Tier D and legacy sources remain.
[no_route_tagger] Without route_tagger, all candidates flatten to watchlist route. Position and swing route quality cannot be measured. Route clarity = zero.

[no_quota_allocator] Without quota_allocator, universe grows from 50 to ~283. Attention cap not enforced: up to 102 attention candidates. Structural overflow of 160 candidates would be included. This is a flat-pool risk — no route protection, no quota discipline.

[no_headwind_pressure_candidates] Without headwind pressure candidates, risk-theme monitoring loses watchlist coverage. Removed 1 headwind candidate(s). Credit stress and risk-off themes become invisible to the universe.

[no_manual_protection] Without manual protection, 13 manually convicted symbols lose protected status and compete for quota with economic candidates. Favourites (ASTS, GLD, IBIT, etc.) may be excluded by structural quota pressure.

[no_attention_cap] Without attention cap, up to 102 attention candidates would compete for universe slots (cap is 15). Attention crowding risk is real — attention overwhelms structural and position candidates without quota_allocator's cap enforcement.

variants.finding: Removing economic candidate feed reduces reason_to_care coverage by 30 candidates. Structural candidates from economic feed are lost; only Tier D and legacy sources remain.

variants.route_clarity_loss: All routes degraded to watchlist — no position/swing/intraday_swing distinction
